4.description: How do enrolled students reduce their student debt balances?This figureֲ plots coefficient estimates from a dynamic version of equationֲ (2),yi,t=־±+גˆ‘ֿ„=גˆ’412־“ֿ„ֳ—Treatedsֳ—Ds,t,ֿ„+־´i+־´p,t+־³ג€²Xs,tגˆ’12+־µi,t$ y_{i,t}= \alpha + \sum _{\tau =-4}^{12} \Gamma _{\tau} \times Treated_{s} \times D_{s,t,\tau} +\delta _{i}+ \delta _{p,t} +\gamma ^{\prime}X_{s,t-12} + \varepsilon _{i,t}$, whereDs,t,ֿ„$D_{s,t,\tau}$is equal to one when quartert$t$isֿ„$\tau$quarters away from a minimum wage increase in states$s$.
